title: taraxacum subintegrum
intro: Taraxacum subintegrum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a type of dandelion that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum subintegrum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Taraxacum subintegrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
